name: Huffman_Block_Encoding
operator_description: Encodes one block of quantized DCT coefficients using Huffman entropy coding for sequential JPEG compression. Processes an 8x8 DCT coefficient block by encoding the DC coefficient as a difference from the previous block's DC value, and encoding AC coefficients in zig-zag scan order with run-length encoding. Outputs compressed bitstream using DC and AC Huffman code tables.
